Home › Lake County › Mount Dora › Gluten-Free Restaurants

Gluten-Free Restaurants in Mount Dora

Which gluten-free spots in Mount Dora grade cleanest?3 of these 4 hold an A; PISCES RISING tops them at 96/100.

4 gluten-free restaurants

  • A 96 P
    PISCES RISING Seafood ★ 4.4 (3241) Mount Dora · Lake County VegGF +6 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 95 C
    CHIPOTLE MEXICAN GRILL 2120 Mexican ★ 3.5 (1378) Mount Dora · Lake County VegGF +6 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 95 F
    FUNKOS POKE BOWLS AND ASIAN SNACKS Other ★ 5 (335) Mount Dora · Lake County VeganVeg +6 more Inspected Jan 2026
  • F 46 C
    COPACABANA CUBAN CAFE Cuban ★ 4.1 (2698) Mount Dora · Lake County VeganVeg +6 more Inspected Mar 2026
